meta.title: No atomic bombs ever exploded over Hiroshima and Nagasaki August 1945
meta.description: No atomic bombs ever exploded over Hiroshima and Nagasaki August 1945. News about 100.000's of Japanese being vaporized in nanoseconds flashes and disappearing in thin air or slowly being killed by nuclear radiation during several months afterwards autumn 1945 at various Japanese hospitals were just Fake News and propaganda!
meta.keywords: Nukes, Nuclear, Bombs, Fake, Fission, Fusion, Hiroshima
